milestones.description: Finalize integration design with PayHub API team; confirm fraud scoring endpoint contract; complete ISO 20022 gap analysis
Automated cross-channel reconciliation live in staging; processing web and mobile channels; <4h cycle time validated in load tests
Real-time fraud scoring integrated at transaction ingestion; shadow mode running in parallel with existing batch engine
Full system live for 10% of retail transaction volume; dispute rate and reconciliation KPIs monitored; operations dashboard deployed
100% of retail and SME transactions on new platform; ISO 20022 message formatting active for all settlement instructions; regulatory sign-off obtained
